sglang.title: Add qwen2 tie word embedding
sglang.author: yileld
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Qwen2 1.5B uses tie word embedding, which is different from other Qwen2 model. So we should add a step to load lm_head's weight from embed_tokens layer.

sglang.title: Add support for VertexAI safety settings
sglang.author: AidanCooper
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Enables user to configure VertexAI safety settings. Example usage:
import sglang as sgl
from vertexai.preview.generative_models import HarmBlockThreshold, HarmCategory

client = sgl.VertexAI(
    "gemini-pro",
    safety_settings={
        HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT: HarmBlockThres

sglang.title: Fix vertexai
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The main branch break after #624. The package vertexai is not installed by default. Should we just remove the type hint or make vertexai a dependency? @merrymercy @AidanCooper

  "tokens": [1985],

vllm.title: [Core] Use numpy to speed up padded token processing
vllm.author: peng1999
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This small change replaces list comprehension with NumPy operations. It results in approximately a 50% speedup for the sampler when processing large batch sizes. This improvement will enhance throughput when running small models. (See benchmark results below)
Related: #249 #5289
Benchmarks
The follo

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Remove "boardwalk" image asset
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Following #6339, it is no longer necessary to test the "boardwalk" image asset (it was originally added due to causing errors in feature size calculations). This should reduce the running time of related tests by around a third.
cc @xwjiang2010

vllm.title: [Misc] Log spec decode metrics
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds speculative decoding metrics to engine metrics so that they can be dumped and evaluated. Two unit tests were added accordingly:

In test_metrics.py, added a unit test to verify theres metrics are correctly logged.
In spec decode conftest, override log interval to 0 (log per request) to

vllm.title: [Kernel][Attention] Separate `Attention.kv_scale` into `k_scale` and `v_scale`
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since we already quantize key_cache and value_cache separately in PagedAttention, there is "free accuracy on the table" for FP8 KV Cache quantization as we could use separate per-tensor scales for each.
The FlashInfer FP8 attention kernel also uses separate k_scale and v_scale values, so this PR is

vllm.title: [ci][distributed] add pipeline parallel correctness test
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: the correctness is tested against pure tensor parallel.

vllm.title: [misc][distributed] improve tests
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
PP=4 tests tends to be quite flaky. before @andoorve fixes it, let's turn off the test first.
in addition, I get reports about zmq connection issue #6355 (comment) , so let's add more info about this. possibly this is the cause of some test hangs.

vllm.title: [misc][distributed] add seed to dummy weights
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: seed the dummy weight, so that we can test the output consistency even with dummy weights

vllm.title: [Distributed][Model] Rank-based Component Creation for Pipeline Parallelism Memory Optimization
vllm.author: wushidonguc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prior to this change, the Llama model initialization in Pipeline Parallel scenarios would create all components and layers for every rank, leading to unnecessary memory overhead. This pull request optimizes memory usage by creating certain components only on the relevant ranks.
The primary changes i
